outline.title: Theological Courses Catalog
outline.summary: Welcome to the comprehensive theological courses program offering 19 courses covering essential ministry topics and Christian education.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: BIB101: Old Testament Survey
outline.summary: Comprehensive survey of the Old Testament covering historical, poetic, and prophetic books. 20 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: BIB102: New Testament Survey
outline.summary: In-depth survey of the New Testament including Gospels, Acts, Paul's epistles, and general epistles. 20 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: THE201: Systematic Theology
outline.summary: Foundational study of Christian doctrine organized by major theological loci including theology proper, Christology, pneumatology, and eschatology. 45 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: BIB201: Biblical Hermeneutics
outline.summary: Training in biblical interpretation principles including grammatical-historical interpretation, genre analysis, and responsible application methods. 35 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: DIV101: Understanding Prophecy
outline.summary: Study of the office and gift of prophecy and its role in the believer's life, including divine insight and spiritual guidance. 25 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: THE301: Fundamentals of Apologetics
outline.summary: Intellectually rigorous course equipping students to defend the Christian faith through reasoned arguments and historical evidence. 35 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: DIV102: Deliverance Ministry
outline.summary: Comprehensive exploration of biblical foundations and practical applications of deliverance ministry and spiritual freedom. 30 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: MIN101: Evangelism and Discipleship
outline.summary: Practical theology course exploring biblical foundations and effective strategies for gospel sharing and making disciples. 30 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: MIN102: Discipleship Training
outline.summary: Comprehensive framework for spiritual formation and leadership development within the body of Christ. 35 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: SPR101: Prayer and Intercession
outline.summary: Spiritually formative course on the theology and practice of prayer as foundation of Christian life and ministry. 30 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: PAS201: Pastoral Counseling
outline.summary: Integrative course combining biblical wisdom, theological reflection, and counseling theory for pastoral care and counseling. 35 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: PAS301: Church Administration
outline.summary: Practical course equipping leaders with essential skills for effective church management and organizational leadership. 30 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: PAS101: Homiletics
outline.summary: Essential course training in biblical preaching, sermon preparation, exegetical techniques, and delivery skills. 35 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: SPR201: Discovering Spiritual Gifts
outline.summary: Comprehensive exploration of spiritual gifts and their role in church life and ministry, with practical assessment tools. 25 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: WOR101: Biblical Worship
outline.summary: Transformative course exploring biblical foundations and theology of Christian worship and authentic worship experiences. 30 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: DIV111: Capstone Project
outline.summary: Culminating course requiring integration of knowledge into comprehensive theological research project or ministry portfolio. 15 CPD, 8 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: DIV112: Christology
outline.summary: In-depth study of the person and work of Jesus Christ, examining biblical foundations and historical Christological doctrine. 10 CPD, 10 lessons.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: DIV113: Contemporary Theological Issues
outline.summary: Exploration of current theological challenges including religious pluralism, science and faith, and social justice theology. 25 CPD, 10 lessons.
